nodes.label: MIDI Pitch Bend
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI pitch bend event (14-bit, 0-16383). Filtered by isPitchWheel(). In MPE mode, only channel 1 is accepted.

nodes.label: Normalize to 0-1
nodes.description: Divides raw pitch wheel value by 16383.0 to produce 0.0-1.0 range. Center (8192) maps to ~0.5.

nodes.label: Table Lookup
nodes.description: 512-point interpolated lookup table maps normalized input to custom output curve. Runs per-event, not per-sample.

nodes.label: Invert (1 - value)
nodes.description: Applies 1.0 - value after table lookup. Center (0.5) is unchanged; up/down are swapped.

nodes.label: Target Value
nodes.description: Stores the processed value as the smoothing target. Initial value is 0.5 (center).

nodes.label: Exponential Smoother
nodes.description: One-pole IIR lowpass filter smooths currentValue toward targetValue per-sample at control rate. Deactivates when SmoothTime=0. Fast-path constant fill when converged.

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Per-sample modulation values written to internalBuffer, then applied to parent chain via applyTimeModulation() with intensity scaling.

nodes.label: Inverted
nodes.description: Boolean toggle. When true, applies 1-value after table lookup.

nodes.label: UseTable
nodes.description: Boolean toggle. When true, routes normalized value through lookup table.

nodes.label: SmoothTime
nodes.description: Smoothing time in milliseconds (0-1000, default 200). Controls one-pole lowpass cutoff. 0 disables smoothing.

nodes.label: UseTable?
nodes.description: Branches signal path: if UseTable is enabled, value passes through table; otherwise bypasses to inversion check.

nodes.label: Inverted?
nodes.description: Branches signal path: if Inverted is enabled, applies 1-value; otherwise passes value through.

nodes.label: MPE Channel Filter
nodes.description: When MPE mode is active, rejects pitch bend events not on channel 1.
